# ADR-0002: Storage engine revision

## Status

Accepted

## Context

Declares its status through a `## Status` heading section, with frontmatter carrying only the supersession pointer and a date. Claims to supersede ADR-0001, which itself claims to supersede this ADR. Seeded violation: two Accepted ADRs claiming to supersede each other (D2), together with `0001-storage-engine.md`.

N/A. Fixture file.
